_comment: Beds24 v2 booking webhook sample — Airbnb channel, propId/unitId only (no names).
_notes: Some Beds24 webhook deliveries omit propName and unitName.
In that case propId and unitId are used as fallback identifiers.
Property upsert: name falls back to propId string value.
Room upsert: room_label falls back to unitId string value.
referer = Airbnb -> calendar bar color: soft pink family.
